command: ssh biscayne.vaasl.io "KUBECONFIG=/home/rix/.kube/config kubectl exec -n laconic-laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85 deployment/laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-deployment -c agave-validator -- grep -n 'download_incremental_for_slot\|No matching incremental\|rolling_incremental\|base.slot\|incr.*slot' /usr/local/bin/snapshot_download.py 2>&1"

Find pending spec files for self-dev

description: List was-sw01 interfaces with MTU info

command: bun test tests/integration/routes/admin/reconciliation.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 20 "should return reconciliation status"

description: Check if worktree is registered in git
Search for pipeline references in plan engine

command:
# Check if the feature is on the v3.2 branch or any other release branch
git ls-remote --heads https://github.com/anza-xyz/agave.git 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'v3\.[12]' | head -10
ansible biscayne -m ansible.builtin.command -a "docker restart laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-control-plane" 2>&1 | tail -3

description: Run full test suite after all migrations

command: git -C /home/rix/.exophial/repos/exophial.git branch -l | grep test-plan-001 2>/dev/null || echo "no branch"

description: Check plan status and dispatcher logs

command: which exophial 2>/dev/null || pip show exophial 2>/dev/null | head -3 || uv tool list 2>/dev/null | grep exophial || find /home/rix/.local/bin -name "exophial*" 2>/dev/null

ssh biscayne.vaasl.io 'cd /srv/deployments/agave-stack/stack-orchestrator/container-build/laconicnetwork-agave && docker build -t laconicnetwork/agave:local --build-arg AGAVE_REPO=https://github.com/anza-xyz/agave.git --build-arg AGAVE_VERSION=v3.1.9 -f Dockerfile .' 2>&1

description: Find examples of hood commands via conn.sock

command: ssh -A biscayne.vaasl.io "sudo timeout 3 tcpdump -i eno2 -c 10 'udp and src port 8001' -n 2>&1 | grep -v 'listening\|link-type\|verbose' | head -10"

find /home/rix -path "*/laconic-so/*" -name "*.env" 2>/dev/null | head -5 ; find /home/rix -path "*/deployments/*" -name "*.env" 2>/dev/null | head -5 ; find /home/rix -name "client-keypair*" -o -name "client.json" 2>/dev/null | head -5
description: Find deployment env files and client keypair

ansible biscayne -i inventory/biscayne.yml -m ansible.builtin.shell \

command: ansible -i inventory/biscayne.yml all -m shell -a "KUBECONFIG=/home/rix/.kube/config kubectl get deployment laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-deployment -n laconic-laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85 -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[*].name}'" 2>/dev/null
sleep 45 && ssh biscayne.vaasl.io "sudo docker exec laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-control-plane kubectl -n laconic-laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85 get pods -o wide" 2>/dev/null

Run load test example to see llama.cpp logs

command: ssh biscayne.vaasl.io "KUBECONFIG=/home/rix/.kube/config kubectl get deployment laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-deployment -n laconic-laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85 -o jsonpath='{range .spec.template.spec.containers[0].env[*]}{.name}={.value}{\"\n\"}{end}' 2>&1 | grep GOSSIP_HOST"
description: Check GOSSIP_HOST value in pod spec
Run all stage output validation tests

command:
ansible -i inventory/biscayne.yml all -m shell -a "
# Zero counters and wait
iptables -t nat -Z PREROUTING 2>/dev/null
sleep 5
echo '=== 5 seconds of PREROUTING ==='
iptables -t nat -L PREROUTING -n -v | grep '137.239.194.65.*9000'
" 2>&1
description: Measure ashburn relay traffic rate over 5s
